description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a rich brown finish and a simple, functional design. The front features a single sliding panel or door on the left side, likely concealing a storage compartment, while the right side is open for legroom. The desk stands on four straight legs, providing stability and a classic silhouette. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing, working, or placing office equipment. The back and sides are solid panels, with the back panel extending nearly the full width and height of the desk. The overall construction suggests durability and a utilitarian style, making it suitable for various work or study environments.
description: A rectangular wooden desk with a sliding panel on the front left, open leg space, and a flat, spacious top. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sliding panel on the left and open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the desk's depth and the solid panel construction on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a full-width solid back panel with no openings or storage features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the desk's depth and solid side panel.
attribute_orientation: The side with the sliding panel and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or general work surface for office or study tasks
